title: Lulu and the Moonhush
cover_prompt: A tiny, round creature with soft silver fur curled in a crescent moon's glow, floating just above a quiet forest canopy. The sky is deep indigo, dotted with faintly twinkling stars, and the moon casts a gentle, dreamy light over the scene. The creature's eyes are half-closed, breathing softly as the night hums around it.
lyrics:
[verse]
Mmm ooh la lu
Shaa noo naa haa
Tss pff mmm ooh
Lu lu shh shh

[verse]
Haa noo laa mmm
Ooh shaa lu lu
Pff tss mmm haa
Shh shh noo noo

[verse]
Mmm lu shaa mmm
Ooh haa lu lu
Tss pff shh shh
Mmm mmm noo noo

---
style_prompt: Gentle folk lullaby, warm female vocal, fingerpicked acoustic guitar, 64 BPM, pastoral, settling, peaceful, evening atmosphere, descending melody phrases, each verse quieter, conversational singing, the world going to sleep, fingerpicked acoustic guitar accompaniment

character.name: Lulu
character.identity: A small, silver-furred dreamweaver who hums the night into stillness.
character.special: Whispers the moon’s quiet to the world below, so every creature can hear the hush.

about: A lullaby of descending echoes, mirroring the way the world softens as night deepens. The gentle, repetitive sounds mimic the rhythm of breathing and the quiet settling of nature, guiding little ones into sleep as the moon watches over them. The slower the song, the deeper the rest.
